0.text: Emphysematous changes in both lung parenchyma

1.text: Consolidation with tree-in-bud appearance in the superior, anterobasal, mediobasal, and laterobasal segments of the left lower lobe

2.text: Thin-walled, well-circumscribed air cyst measuring 2.3x2.4 cm in the superior segment of the left lower lobe
